api_key.description: Perigon API key, sent as the apiKey query parameter. Never logged.

base_url.description: Perigon API base URL override for tests or proxies.

query.description: Optional search query string sent as the articles stream's q parameter.

start_date.description: RFC3339 lower bound; only articles published at or after this time are read (articles stream only).

max_pages.description: Maximum pages; use 0, all, or unlimited to exhaust the stream.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
